title: Farmer's Cutting: Oh The Biomes We've Gone
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for Oh The Biomes We've Gone
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) cutting board recipes for [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/mod/oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)

- Bark, stripping, recycling for all wood types
- More dye from:
    - Flowers that craft into 1 dye
    - Blueberries

![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ickBpNUE/images/5ee18d8842874b754f98b0b10bdab3019fe982a6.png) ![Flower Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ickBpNUE/images/908157c414776f5d680e041c4110c6fc8205477f.png) ![Blueberry Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ickBpNUE/images/a49fa272b63d7828a0d6cb92c47997e4ca391d06.png)
